description: Tool definitions for EAGLE acquisition assistant in Anthropic tool_use format. Updated 2026-04-09 for canonical schema propagation.

tools.name: search_far
tools.description: Search the Federal Acquisition Regulation (FAR) and Defense Federal Acquisition Regulation Supplement (DFARS) for relevant clauses, requirements, and guidance. Returns part numbers, sections, titles, full text summaries, and applicability notes.

query.description: Search query — topic, clause number, or keyword

parts.description: Specific FAR part numbers to search (e.g. ['6', '13', '15'])

tools.name: create_document
tools.description: Generate acquisition documents including SOW, IGCE, Market Research, J&A, Acquisition Plan, Evaluation Criteria, Security Checklist, Section 508 Statement, COR Certification, Contract Type Justification, Statement of Need, Buy American DF, Subcontracting Plan, and Conference Request. Documents are saved to S3. Each doc_type has a defined section structure — fill EVERY section.

doc_type.description: Type of acquisition document to generate. Use canonical values only.

title.description: Descriptive document title including the program or acquisition name (e.g. 'SOW - Cloud Computing Services for NCI Research Portal'). Never use a generic type label alone.

content.description: Full document content as markdown. Write complete, section-by-section content using the conversation context before calling this tool. This becomes the saved document body. Cover ALL sections defined in the template schema.

update_existing_key.description: S3 key of existing document to update. If provided, creates a new version (package docs) or overwrites (workspace docs) instead of creating a new document.

data.description: Document-specific fields for template population. Use CANONICAL field names only.

description.description: Detailed description of the requirement. Use 'description' NOT 'requirement'.

estimated_value.description: Estimated contract value in dollars. Use 'estimated_value' NOT 'estimated_cost' or 'budget'.

period_of_performance.description: Duration of the contract (e.g., '12 months from award'). Use 'period_of_performance' NOT 'duration' or 'pop'.

contract_type.description: Contract type. Use canonical values: ffp, cpff, t&m, etc.

tasks.description: List of tasks to be performed (for SOW)

period_months.description: Period of performance in months (for IGCE)

contractor.description: Proposed contractor name for J&A. Use 'contractor' NOT 'contractor_name' or 'vendor'.

vendors_identified.description: Potential vendors for market research. Use 'vendors_identified' NOT 'vendors'.

tools.name: s3_document_ops
tools.description: Read, write, list, delete, copy, rename, move, check existence, or generate presigned URLs for documents stored in S3. All documents are scoped per-tenant.

operation.description: Operation to perform on S3 objects

bucket.description: S3 bucket name (uses S3_BUCKET env var if not specified)

tools.name: dynamodb_intake
tools.description: Create, read, update, delete, list, query, count, batch_get, or batch_write intake records in DynamoDB. All records are scoped per-tenant using PK/SK patterns.

items.description: Array of item objects for batch_write (max 25)

tools.name: get_intake_status
tools.description: Get the current intake package status and completeness. Shows which documents exist, which are missing, and next actions needed.

intake_id.description: Intake package ID (defaults to active intake if not provided)

tools.name: cloudwatch_logs
tools.description: Read CloudWatch logs, run Logs Insights queries, or list log groups. Use this to inspect application logs, debug issues, or audit user activity.

operation.description: Log operation: search, recent events, get stream, run Insights query, or list log groups

filter_pattern.description: CloudWatch filter pattern for searching logs

start_time.description: Start time for log search (ISO format or relative like '-1h')

end_time.description: End time for log search (ISO format)

limit.description: Maximum number of log events to return (default: 50)

query.description: CloudWatch Logs Insights query string (for 'insights' operation)

prefix.description: Log group name prefix filter (for 'list_groups' operation)
